refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns true if the raster is empty (width = 0 and height = 0). Otherwise, returns false.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns true if the raster is empty (width = 0 and height = 0). Otherwise, returns false.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT ST_IsEmpty(ST_MakeEmptyRaster(100, 100, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0)) st_isempty | -----------+ f |
SELECT ST_IsEmpty(ST_MakeEmptyRaster(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0)) st_isempty | -----------+ t |
